title: ania malayana
intro: Ania malayana, also known as Malay Ania or Ania, is a type of plant species in the family Anisophylleaceae. It is a shrub native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ania malayana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal use.
